title: Plugin SDK command scaffolding
purpose: Reduce plugin authoring friction by adding a first-party scaffold command and clearer local fixture replay workflow.
actions: Generate minimal manifest and fixture replay structure
Document validate, inspect, test, run, commit flow
Add tests for scaffolded plugin validation

criteria: Scaffold command never overwrites existing plugin files without explicit force
No public marketplace assumptions are introduced

summary: Added plugin scaffold command/API with overwrite protection, generated manifest/ObjectBatch, docs, and validation tests.
